name: Arjun Sharma
resume_text:
Senior ML Engineer with 6 years of experience specialising in NLP and large language models. Deployed models to production on AWS using Docker and Kubernetes. 6+ years experience in machine learning.
Built BERT-based document retrieval system reducing query latency by 40%.
Built RAG pipeline serving 10M queries/day on AWS Kubernetes cluster.
Implemented CI/CD for ML models using Docker and GitHub Actions.
Trained and fine-tuned LLMs on proprietary datasets achieving 18% accuracy improvement.
Designed Spark and Airflow data pipeline processing 5TB per day at Amazon scale.
Experience at TechCorp India 2018 to 2024.

name: Priya Nair
resume_text:

name: Amit Desai
resume_text:

education: PhD Natural Language Processing IISc Bangalore

name: Rohit Verma
resume_text:

name: Sneha Kulkarni
resume_text:

name: Rahul Mehta
resume_text:

name: Kavya Reddy
resume_text:

name: Divya Sharma
resume_text:
